Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT fs.kapitel, fs.seite, fs.titel, substr\(fs.kommentar,1,400\) FROM figure_scenes fs JOIN scene_figures sf ON fs.id=sf.scene_id WHERE fs.book_id=1 AND sf.fig_id='fig_13';")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM pages WHERE book_id=1;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT r.from_fig_id, f1.name AS from_name, r.to_fig_id, f2.name AS to_name, r.typ, r.beschreibung, r.machtverhaltnis FROM figure_relations r LEFT JOIN figures f1 ON f1.fig_id=r.from_fig_id AND f1.book_id=r.book_id LEFT JOIN figures f2 ON f2.fig_id=r.to_fig_id AND f2.book_id=r.book_id WHERE r.book_id=1 AND \(r.from_fig_id='fig_13' OR r.to_fig_id='fig_13'\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Servers:', d.get\('servers'\)\); print\('Paths with wordrelations:'\); [print\(' ', p\) for p in d.get\('paths',{}\) if 'wordrelation' in p.lower\(\) or 'synonym' in p.lower\(\)]; print\('All paths \(first 30\):'\); [print\(' ', p\) for p in list\(d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:30]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); german = [c.get\('corpusName'\) for c in d if 'deu' in \(c.get\('corpusName'\) or ''\).lower\(\)]; print\('German corpora \(first 20\):'\); [print\(' ', c\) for c in german[:20]]; print\('total german:', len\(german\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('/Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/prompt-config.json'\); const de=c.locales['de-CH']; console.log\('baseRules:', \(de.baseRules||''\).length, 'chars'\); console.log\('systemPrompts.lektorat:', \(de.systemPrompts?.lektorat||''\).length, 'chars'\); console.log\('commonRules.de:', \(c.commonRules?.de||''\).length, 'chars'\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('/Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/prompt-config.json'\); console.log\('OK'\); console.log\('Locales:', Object.keys\(c.locales\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Buchtypen \(de\):', Object.keys\(c.buchtypen.de\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Buchtypen \(en\):', Object.keys\(c.buchtypen.en\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Stopwords de-CH unique:', new Set\(c.locales['de-CH'].stopwords\).size === c.locales['de-CH'].stopwords.length\); console.log\('Stopwords de-DE unique:', new Set\(c.locales['de-DE'].stopwords\).size === c.locales['de-DE'].stopwords.length\); console.log\('de-DE stilkorrektur has ausschließlich:', c.locales['de-DE'].systemPrompts.stilkorrektur.includes\('ausschließlich'\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/de.json'\)\); e=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/en.json'\)\); print\('de keys:', len\(d\)\); print\('en keys:', len\(e\)\); missing = set\(d\) - set\(e\); extra = set\(e\) - set\(d\); print\('missing in en:', missing\); print\('extra in en:', extra\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/de.json'\)\); json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/en.json'\)\); print\('both JSON files OK'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/de.json'\)\); e=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/en.json'\)\); print\('de:', len\(d\), 'en:', len\(e\)\); print\('missing in en:', set\(d\)-set\(e\)\); print\('missing in de:', set\(e\)-set\(d\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/de.json'\)\); e=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/en.json'\)\); print\('de:', len\(d\), 'en:', len\(e\)\); m1=set\(d\)-set\(e\); m2=set\(e\)-set\(d\); print\('missing in en:', m1 or 'none'\); print\('missing in de:', m2 or 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/de.json'\)\); e=json.load\(open\('public/js/i18n/en.json'\)\); print\('de:', len\(d\), 'en:', len\(e\)\); print\('diff:', \(set\(d\)^set\(e\)\) or 'none'\)")
